## Summary

- What changed?
- Why?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run lint:all`
- [ ] If docs touched: README and package metadata are still accurate
- [ ] If lint behavior changed: updated/added plugin tests
- [ ] If path matching changed: include/exclude behavior is covered

## Impact

- Affected areas:
- Breaking changes: Yes/No
- Security or CI-noise risk:
- Rollback plan:
